message:
fix: wrap burnWisps in transaction for atomic deletion (bd-6py7)

burnWisps() called s.DeleteIssue() in a loop without a transaction,
causing partial deletion on failure. Now uses transact() with
tx.DeleteIssue() so the entire burn is atomic — if any delete fails,
the transaction rolls back. Matches the pattern used by squashMolecule.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
